name: Organizer
description: The main organization responsible for planning, managing, and executing the competition or competition edition. Defines rules, schedule, and overall structure.

name: Host Organization
description: The organization or federation in the country or venue where the competition is physically held. Responsible for local logistics, infrastructure, and on-site operations.

name: Sponsor
description: A commercial or institutional partner providing financial or material support for the competition in exchange for visibility and branding rights.

name: Co-Organizer
description: An additional organization sharing partial responsibility for organizing the competition alongside the main organizer.

name: Technical Delegate
description: A representative responsible for ensuring the competition is conducted according to official technical rules and standards of the governing federation.

name: Media Partner
description: An organization responsible for broadcasting, media coverage, and distribution of competition content across platforms.

name: Equipment Provider
description: A partner supplying official equipment, targets, or technical systems used during the competition.
